name: Suzaku Divine Emperor Inheritance
description: Wang Lin inherits the Suzaku divine emperor position and the Vermilion Bird inheritance.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Suzaku Divine Emperor Inheritance. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
